content_preservation: The last Course Learning Outcome is incomplete/truncated.

structural_coherence: The header "Webpage: https://safe.engr.tamu.edu Biography" is malformed; it combines a URL with a section title.

A "URL for Resource" entry is incorrectly placed under the "Lecture Activities" sub-section within the "Grading Policy" section. It appears to be a resource material, not part of the lecture activities description.
The header "### Grading Policy" is duplicated.

In the "Detailed course schedule" table, several entries in the "Subject" column contain an extraneous pipe character ('|'), e.g., "Quiz 1 | Spaceflight-associated neurovestibular effects", which incorrectly suggests a column break.

proposals.reasoning: The header 'Webpage: https://safe.engr.tamu.edu Biography' is malformed and combines a URL with a descriptive label, making it unsuitable as a standalone header. 'URL for Resource' appears as a label within a sub-section, not a true header. The second occurrence of '### Grading Policy' is a duplicate and should be removed. The pipe character '| ' in the 'Detailed course schedule' table's 'Subject' column is an extraneous artifact that should be removed.
